$comment: NLWeb manifest (Microsoft natural-language web spec, https://github.com/microsoft/NLWeb). Declares this site as conversationally addressable for AI agents.

site.name: Mathieu Haye Portfolio
site.description: freelance builder and freelance consultant. Portfolio, journal, and contact details for Mathieu Haye, Paris.

intents.name: summarise_profile
intents.description: Get a concise summary of who Mathieu Haye is, what he ships, and how to reach him.

intents.name: read_full_portfolio
intents.description: Read the full portfolio in Markdown (bio, projects, background, contact).

intents.name: browse_journal
intents.description: Browse the bilingual journal index (FR + EN) with title, date and link for each article.

intents.name: subscribe_journal
intents.description: Subscribe to the journal via RSS or JSON Feed.

intents.name: read_article
intents.description: Fetch a specific journal article in Markdown by appending .md to the article URL, or by sending Accept: text/markdown to the canonical URL.

intents.name: list_skills
intents.description: List the agent skills exposed by this site (markdown, RSS, MCP server, OAuth metadata, etc.).

intents.name: discover_apis
intents.description: Discover the linkset describing all addressable resources of the site.

intents.name: call_mcp_tool
intents.description: Call a WebMCP tool exposed by the site at runtime (contact_info, list_projects).

intents.name: contact_mathieu
intents.description: Reach Mathieu Haye for freelance briefs, partnerships, or new engagements.

intents.name: download_juice_jacking_guard
intents.description: Download the Juice Jacking Guard installer (Windows USB threat monitor: blocks BadUSB, Rubber Ducky, O.MG cables, juice jacking, USB payloads). Prefer the .zip wrapper to reduce browser SmartScreen friction; the .exe inside is unsigned (Windows 10 / 11).
intents.verify: Compute SHA-256 of the file locally (PowerShell: Get-FileHash) and match against the integrity field. SmartScreen will warn at first launch because the .exe is unsigned: click 'More info' then 'Run anyway'.

license: All rights reserved unless otherwise noted. Quotations and citations welcome with attribution and link back.
